library.title: Plants and Living Things
library.summary: Introductory workbook pages on plants, their structures, needs, growth, and basic life science.

library.title: Animals and Their Needs
library.summary: Workbook practice focused on animals, survival needs, inherited traits, and life cycles.

library.title: Habitats and Food Relationships
library.summary: Pages on how plants and animals depend on habitats, food, water, and one another.

library.title: Homes for Plants and Animals
library.summary: Habitat practice covering Arctic, woodland, desert, rain forest, ponds, streams, and oceans.

library.title: Caring for Habitats and Water on Earth
library.summary: Environmental care, water habitats, the water cycle, weather, and gradual Earth changes.

library.title: Earth Changes and Fossils
library.summary: Fast and slow Earth changes plus fossil evidence and comparisons between past and present life.

library.title: Earth History, Sun, Day and Night, and Seasons
library.summary: Transitions from fossils and Earth history into sunlight, rotation, day and night, and seasons.

library.title: The Moon and Stars
library.summary: Practice on Moon appearance and phases, stars, constellations, and patterns in the night sky.

library.title: Matter and Changes in Matter
library.summary: Matter, measurement, states of matter, physical and chemical changes, and heat energy.

library.title: Light, Sound, and Energy
library.summary: Workbook pages on light behavior, sound waves and vibration, and basic forms of energy.

library.title: Magnets, Forces, and Motion
library.summary: Practice with magnets and magnetic fields, gravity, forces, and ways objects move.
